abilities.name: One Eye on the Pigs
abilities.description: At start of turn, if Pig within 3 yards, generate additional AP only for Movement General Action.

abilities.name: Squeal (Mask)
abilities.description: After damaged by enemy Close Combat attack, push 4 yards directly away.

actions: (1) Slop Bucket (Melee) | AV: 2C (8C) | Rg: y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/2/2 damage. Crow Full of Slop: After succeeding, take Tossed Slop Action even if engaged.

(1) Tossed Slop (Thrown Weapon) | AV: 5 (11) | Rg: z9 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/2/3B damage. Gains Covered in Slop Condition until washed off (- to Social duels, cannot declare Triggers, Pigs gain + to attacks). Mask Come and Get It: Every Pig within p5 pushes 5 yards toward and makes y attack. Capacity 1, Reload 1.
system.notes: Coveted position among Gremlins due to food perks. Get first pick of pig food. Quick on feet to avoid becoming main course. Throw disgusting slop at enemies.
